backend_rationale: No OpenSpec in this project. Single-tool (Claude Code) execution with progress.json bookkeeping. Hybrid not warranted at this scale.

next_action.description: M1+M3 in progress. After PR-A lands, execute M2: git merge upstream/main + SurrealDB v030 + golden regen.

phase_progress: Phase 3: 0/2 changes done. Executing M1+M3 (PR-A) first.

queued_phases.post_phase_action: Commit + PR. C-007's prod Dockerfile end-to-end verified post-Phase-3-M1 in CI.
queued_phases.blocked_by_at_plan_time: phase-3 M2 upstream merge (did NOT block execution — only blocks final-stage COPY verification in C-007)
queued_phases.summary: Extend Dockerfile + Dockerfile.rust-dev with Rust nightly + Python 3.13 + Node 24 + Bun + TS6 + Go 1.26.3 + TinyGo + full WASM toolchain (wasmtime, wasm-tools, cargo-component, componentize-py, AssemblyScript, Javy, Emscripten, wasi-sdk, Binaryen). Production stays slim — runtime libs only.

decisions_baked.D1: Path 1 — runtime libs only in prod
